headline: Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) Could Be 3% Undervalued Following Russell Value Index Inclusion
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) has been added to several Russell value indexes, including the Russell 1000 Value, drawing new attention to how the stock fits into broader value portfolios. See our latest analysis for Royal Caribbean Cruises. At a share price of US$288.08, Royal Caribbean Cruises has seen a 4.0% 90 day share price return, while the 1 year total shareholder return has declined 14.2%. This follows a very large 5 year total shareholder return of about 4x, suggesting momentum has...
